title: Mini Scaled Enhanced
description: This mod is an enhanced version of the Mini Scaled mod
body:
Welcome to the enhanced version of the Mini Scaled mod! This project brings the classic miniature building and shrinking mechanics directly to your current modpack, allowing you to construct incredibly detailed, tiny structures and seamlessly integrate them into your game.

Whether you are looking to build micro-dioramas, shrink your character down for custom maps, or just experiment with miniature block scales alongside your other Fabric mods, this port has you covered.

Credits:

Original Mod Creator: qouteall (Original mod creation, mechanics, and concept)

[The Original Mini Scaled Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/miniscaled)

This Version of the mod provides accessibility to the latest version of Immersive Portals.

This version also adds new tools and mechanics.

New tools:

- Blueprint Item (lets you save your creations and even have them in other worlds)
- Stained Glass Remover (after you build the frame of your creation with stained glass, it will be easier if you would have the ability to remove all of them at once, and thats what this tool does)
- Frame Builder (a tool that lets you select the size of the frame you want and you can place it down)

Dependencies:

[Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals) (Required) - Mini Scaled relies on the non-Euclidean rendering mechanics of Immersive Portals to display the scaled-down blocks and entities seamlessly. Ensure this is placed in your mods folder before launching!
